zh.Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-F: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾沙吉布利勒-文
zh.Marmagne (21): 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬馬格
zh.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello是Dreux de Mello和Helvis de Chateau-Chinon的兒子，於大約1175年出生在法國皮卡迪。他於大約1235年與Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年9月3日在法國布格尼艾福姆享年78歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬馬格。

zh-hans.Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-F: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾沙吉布利勒-文
zh-hans.Marmagne (21): 法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬馬格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello是Dreux de Mello和Helvis de Chateau-Chinon的儿子，于大约1175年出生在法国皮卡迪。他于大约1235年与Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年9月3日在法国布格尼艾福姆享年78岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易馬馬格。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mello
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Adelino, Ana, Joaquin, Acacio, Claudio, Cristina, Fernando, Americo, Enrique.  Portuguese Duarte, Joaquim, Armanda, Joao, Paulo, Serafim.
Italian: probably from a short form of a personal name ending with the hypocoristic suffix -ello, such as Giacomello from Giacomo .

variants.name: Giacomo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Gino, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Giacomo, from Latin Jacobus via Late Latin Jacomus (see James and Jacob ).

variants.name: Melle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
Italian: habitational name from Melle in Cuneo province (Piedmont); in some cases possibly also a variant of a personal name such as   Mello   1.
Norwegian: probably a variant of   Mele  .

variants.name: Mellone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Emidio, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Mello  .

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, now used as a given name throughout the English-speaking world. In the 20th century it was particularly popular in Australia. The surname was originally a Norman baronial name, but a precise identification of the place from which it was derived has not been made (there are a large number of possible candidates). The Bruces were an influential Norman family in Scottish affairs in the early Middle Ages; its most famous member was  Robert  ‘the Bruce’ (  1274–1329 ), who is said to have drawn inspiration after his defeat at Methven from the perseverance of a spider in repeatedly climbing up again after being knocked down. He ruled Scotland as  King Robert I  from  1306 to 1329 .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello was born about 1175, in Picardie, France as the son of Dreux de Mello and Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. He married Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses about 1235. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 September 1252, in Mouchy, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 78, and was buried in Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello est né environ 1175, à Picardie, France, fils de Dreux de Mello et Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. Il a épousé Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses environ 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1252, à Mouchy, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello wurde um 1175 in Picardie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Dreux de Mello und Helvis de Chateau-Chinon geboren. Er hat um 1235 Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1252 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Mouchy, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello è nato il circa 1175 nel Picardie, Francia come figlio di Dreux de Mello e Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. Lui sposato Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses circa 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1252, nel Mouchy, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Melloは約1175年にフランスピカーディでDreux de MelloとHelvis de Chateau-Chinonの息子として生まれた。約1235年にDame Helvis de Montbard Epoissesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年9月3日にフランスボウルゴグンニevアモウチイで78歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーマルマグンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello(은)는 대략 1175년 프랑스 피카디에서 Dreux de Mello(와)과 Helvis de Chateau-Chinon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1235년 Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 9월 3일 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 모우c히에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 마마그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Picardie, França filho de Dreux de Mello e Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. Ele casou-se com Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses aproximadamente 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1252, em Mouchy, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello родился около 1175 г. в местности пикарди, Франция. Его родителей звали Dreux de Mello и Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses около 1235 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 сентября 1252 г. в местности моучи, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности мармагн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Dreux II de Mello nació aproximadamente 1175, en Picardie, Francia como hijo de Dreux de Mello y Helvis de Chateau-Chinon. Se casó con Dame Helvis de Montbard Epoisses aproximadamente 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1252, en Mouchy, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Marmagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
